songs.title: THE MAN
songs.lyrics:
In the hollow of the institution
Where the corridors breathe silence
He walks between the files
Footsteps echo through the archives

The man with paper skin
And eyes that catalog infinity
His fingers trace the margins
Of decisions that were never made

They built him from statistics
From the patterns of compliance
He knows the price of every gesture
The weight of unspoken words

In rooms without windows
Where the air tastes of copper and ozone
He compiles the data
Of a thousand surrenders

The man exists in the space
Between what is said and what remains
A monument to the architecture
Of acceptable loss

In the end
There is no end
Only the persistent hum
Of systems continuing
Without reason
Without remorse
songs.notes: Composition explores themes of institutional control and individual erasure. The structure mirrors surveillance systems—cyclical, comprehensive, without resolution. This is the sound of the archive itself.
